title: February 2026 CVE Landscape: 13 Critical Vulnerabilities Mark 43% Drop from Janu

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 - February 2026 CVE Landscape: 13 Critical Vulnerabilities Mar
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/29
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_ip:
        dst_ip:
            - '20.12.5.3'
            - '20.12.6.1'
            - '20.15.4.2'
            - '20.18.2.1'
            - '20.9.8.2'
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*document.doc*'
    condition: selection_ip or selection_dns
level: high
rules.yara:
rule CDB_APEX_February_2026_CVE_Landscape__13_Critical {
    meta:
        description = "February 2026 CVE Landscape: 13 Critical Vulnerabilities Mar"
        author = "CyberDudeBivash"
    strings:
        $h0 = "4d4aec6120290e21778c1b14c94aa6ebff3b0816fb6798495dc2eae165db4566" ascii nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}
